title: chelidonium vernale
intro: Chelidonium vernale, also known as Spring Celandine or Wood Poppy, is a perennial plant belonging to the Papaveraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chelidonium vernale include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and promote liver and kidney health. Chelidonium vernale is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or topical cream, and it is also used in herbal remedies to treat a range of health conditions.
